name: Everything MCP Server - MCP Official Example
notes: This MCP server attempts to utilize all the functions of the MCP protocol. It is not intended to be a practical/useful server; instead, it serves as a test server for developers of MCP clients. It implements features such as prompts, tools, resources, and sampling to demonstrate the capabilities of MCP.

name: AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the Streamable HTTP Protocol - MCP Official Example
notes:
This is a quick access example for AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the Streamable HTTP Protocol.
To obtain the KEY (API Key): Please visit the AutoNavi Open Platform Console (URL: https://lbs.amap.com/api/mcp-server/create-project-and-key). If you do not have a developer account yet, please register as a developer first.

name: AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the SSE Protocol - MCP Official Example
notes:
This is a quick access example for AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the SSE Protocol.
To obtain the KEY (API Key): Please visit the AutoNavi Open Platform Console (URL: https://lbs.amap.com/api/mcp-server/create-project-and-key). If you do not have a developer account yet, please register as a developer first.

name: AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the STDIO Protocol - MCP Official Example
notes:
This is a quick access example for AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the STDIO Protocol (Standard Input/Output Protocol).
To obtain the KEY (API Key): Please visit the AutoNavi Open Platform Console (URL: https://lbs.amap.com/api/mcp-server/create-project-and-key). If you do not have a developer account yet, please register as a developer first.

name: Python 3.11 - uv/pip - Streamable-HTTP
init_script:
# Install build dependencies for Python
apt-get update && apt-get install -y build-essential libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libffi-dev libbz2-dev libreadline-dev libsqlite3-dev curl git libncursesw5-dev xz-utils tk-dev libxml2-dev libxmlsec1-dev liblzma-dev
v=3.11.9
# Pyenv mirror (Huawei Cloud):
mkdir -p ~/.pyenv/cache/
wget -nc https://mirrors.huaweicloud.com/python/$v/Python-$v.tar.xz -P ~/.pyenv/cache/
# uv mirror (Aliyun):
export UV_PYPI_MIRROR=https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/

cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/
pyenv install -s $v
pyenv local $v
uv venv
source .venv/bin/activate
uv pip install -r requirements.txt
notes: Python 3.11 High Performance (uv) - Streamable-HTTP: For fastest setup and efficient HTTP streaming.

name: Python 3.10 - Global/pip - Stdio
init_script:
# Install build dependencies for Python
apt-get update && apt-get install -y build-essential libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libffi-dev libbz2-dev libreadline-dev libsqlite3-dev curl git libncursesw5-dev xz-utils tk-dev libxml2-dev libxmlsec1-dev liblzma-dev
v=3.10.14
# Pyenv mirror (Huawei Cloud):
mkdir -p ~/.pyenv/cache/
wget -nc https://mirrors.huaweicloud.com/python/$v/Python-$v.tar.xz -P ~/.pyenv/cache/
# pip mirror (Aliyun):
pip config set global.index-url https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/

cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/
pyenv install -s $v
pyenv local $v
pip install -r requirements.txt
echo 'Dependency installation complete. Config is managed by meta.'
notes: Python 3.10 Global - Stdio: For Docker/CI. Installs directly to system path. (Testing: Uses /mcp HTTP endpoint)

name: Node.js 20 - npm - SSE
init_script:
# npm mirror (Aliyun):
# npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com

source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh
nvm install 20
nvm use 20
cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/
npm install
command: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && npm start -- --transport=sse --port=8080
notes: Node.js 20 LTS (npm) - SSE: Recommended for production web services. Uses NVM and npm.
